meaning: n.索引,[数学]指数,指标,(刻度盘上)指针vt.编入索引中,指出vi.做索引
examples: There's even a special subject index.
It will be published with annotations and index.
The Dow Jones index fell 15 points this morning.
The loss was from bad bets on the direction of European stock index futures.
That looks pale alongside the 12.7% you could have earned on the Vanguard Index 500 fund.
